description_long: This is a two-tone baseball cap featuring a vibrant orange body with a white front panel. The front panel displays a simple green geometric logo, possibly representing a stylized letter or symbol. The cap is constructed with visible stitching along the seams and panels, adding to its classic sporty appearance. The crown is rounded and structured, topped with a small fabric-covered button. The brim is slightly curved and matches the orange color of the main body. At the back, there is an adjustable strap, likely made of plastic, for size customization.
description: A sporty orange and white baseball cap with a green logo on the front and an adjustable strap at the back.
description_view_0: The back view shows the orange body, visible seam lines, and an adjustable strap opening.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the orange side panel, white front panel, and partial view of the green logo.
description_view_2: The front view displays the white panel with a green geometric logo and the orange curved brim.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the orange side panel and the white front with the logo partially visible.
